title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Inference Brief: Cursor Pagination Snapshot
summary: The API exposes table-shaped routes, replays writes by key without comparing content, uses offset pagination under mutation, and publishes events outside transaction consistency. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts cursor pagination snapshot increment in consistent resource API and operation ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design stable cursor ordering, tie breakers, direction, signed opaque cursors, filters, snapshot expectations, limits, and insert or delete behavior.
Connect version columns, ETags, preconditions, atomic updates, affected-row checks, conflict disclosure, and safe retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Cursor Pagination Snapshot · Theory Cursor Pagination Snapshot
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 2199 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Design stable cursor ordering, tie breakers, direction, signed opaque cursors, filters, snapshot expectations, limits, and insert or delete behavior.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Cursor Pagination Snapshot contract for the supplied data.
